final_answer:
You are right; I should have added it immediately once you made the requirement clear.

Why it matters: this prevents future answers from dumping file/function details when you are asking for system-level launch decisions.

What I did: added a new `Explanation Style` section to `preferences.md` requiring plain English, system-design-level answers, no file/function-name spam unless you ask for exact code proof, and no vague metaphors.
